title: VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION - 211info
text: JACKSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations, COVID-19, HPV, and travel immunizations. Influenza (flu) vaccines are provided as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 140 S Holly Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted, and the HPV9 immunization for 9 y/o to 45 y/o Hours: Monday-Friday 9-11am and 1 to 4pm Email (541) 774-8209 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 774-8209 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance, sliding scale fees offered to uninsured patients. No child will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Immunization record and insurance information, if available LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation for other languages using Language Link AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization COVID-19 Immunization Clinics Flu Vaccines HPV Immunizations Travel Immunizations Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SYRINGE EXCHANGE PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JACKSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
